hero.name: Joel Jaba Singh J
hero.label: Based in Chennai, India
hero.description: Robotics & Automation student driven by curiosity and innovation. Passionate about AI, robotics, ROS 2, embedded systems, and creating technology that solves real-world challenges.

about.bio1: I am a Robotics & Automation student with a strong interest in artificial intelligence, robotics, embedded systems, and software development. I enjoy learning new technologies, solving real-world problems, and building projects that combine innovation with practical applications.
about.bio2: I am constantly exploring new tools and frameworks to expand my technical skills while working on projects in AI, ROS 2, computer vision, and IoT. My goal is to grow as an engineer, contribute to impactful solutions, and continue learning through hands-on experience.

bullets: Explored technologies such as robotics, IoT, ROS 2, and embedded systems through club activities.
Enhanced technical knowledge through collaborative project development and peer learning.

projects.title: Development of an AMR for Warehouse Material Transportation using ROS 2
projects.desc: Developed an autonomous mobile robot simulation using ROS 2 with Gazebo and RViz. Implemented SLAM for mapping, localization, and autonomous navigation while integrating Nav2 for path planning and obstacle avoidance.

projects.title: Brain Tumor Detection using Deep Learning
projects.desc: Built a deep learning model to classify brain tumors from MRI images using multiple CNN architectures. Applied image preprocessing, data augmentation, and model evaluation to achieve high classification accuracy.

projects.title: Smart Glove for Sign Language Translation  using ESP32
projects.desc: Designed a wearable smart glove that translates hand gestures into text and speech in real time. Combined flex sensors and IMU data with a Random Forest model for accurate gesture recognition.

projects.title: Industrial Pick and Place Robot Simulation
projects.desc: Simulated an industrial pick-and-place robot using RoboDK and a FANUC robotic arm. Programmed robotic movements to perform automated object handling in a virtual production environment.

projects.title: PLC-Based Fire Alarm System
projects.desc: Designed and implemented a PLC-based fire alarm system using ladder logic programming. Integrated fire detection sensors with alarm indicators and control logic to provide reliable industrial fire monitoring and emergency response.
